Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Bodirsky B, Humpenoeder F, Dietrich J, Stevanovic M, Weindl I, Karstens K, Wang X, Mishra A, Beier F, Breier J, Yalew A, Chen D, Biewald A, Wirth S, von Jeetze P, Leip D, Crawford M, Alves M, Sauer P, Rein P (2026). magpie4: MAgPIE outputs R package for MAgPIE version 4.x. R package version 2.72.0. 

@Manual{,
  title = {magpie4: MAgPIE outputs R package for MAgPIE version 4.x},
